name: eBay UK
notes: Strong sold/completed and auction dynamics; access/API/scraping constraints need care.

name: Vinted UK
notes: High listing churn and buyers; sold proof weaker; delisting not always sale.

name: Depop
notes: Good youth/fashion demand; sold evidence/access may be limited.

name: StockX
notes: Strong price discovery for trainers; access and regional fees need validation.

name: Laced
notes: UK trainer marketplace; useful for ask/reference data.

name: Sedo
notes: Good domain marketplace presence; sold comps often need other sources.

name: GoDaddy Auctions
notes: Strong auction/closeout dynamics; may require account/access.

name: ExpiredDomains.net
notes: Strong domain source/discovery; keyword filtering may need account.

name: Facebook Marketplace
notes: Buyer intent and turnover possible but access/privacy/manual-heavy.

name: Gumtree UK
notes: Local classified turnover; sold proof weak.

name: BrickLink
notes: Good specialist demand and catalogue structure.

name: Discogs
notes: Strong historical price/reference data for music.

name: Flippa
notes: Useful for digital assets; due diligence heavy.
